title: Happy Birthday!
name: Armaan Pandher
message: Amazing year ahead filled with exciting challenges, big wins, and countless reasons to smile every day!

title: Happy Birthday!
name: Mikhail Ladutko
message: Wishing you an amazing year ahead filled with success and joy!

title: Outstanding Recognition!
reason: Exceptional training delivery with careful attention to detail and note-taking

title: Team Excellence!
reason: Outstanding collaboration and technical expertise in app growth automation

title: Technical Leadership!
reason: Exceptional technical problem-solving and system optimization

title: Supply Account Management Expansion
headline: Growing Account Portfolio Drives New Hiring
description: Our supply-side account management team is expanding to handle the growing portfolio of enterprise publisher relationships, focusing on C-level conversations and technical monetization optimization.
takeaway: Strong demand signals healthy business growth and market position

title: AI Workflow Revolution
headline: Development Time Slashed by 95% with AI Integration
description: Our development team achieved breakthrough efficiency by integrating AI agents into workflows. Complex features that previously took 1-1.5 weeks now complete in just 5 hours, with automated JIRA integration and GitHub PR creation.

title: BidMachine Market Dominance
headline: Outperforming Major Competitors in Key Metrics
description: BidMachine consistently maintains higher wallet share than DT Exchange and outperforms competitors like Liftoff and Fiber DT, demonstrating sustainable competitive advantage beyond one-time gains.
takeaway: Strong market position validates our exchange strategy

title: Gaming Automation Testing
headline: AI-Powered Game Testing Achieves 2-3 Second Response Times
description: Our gaming automation infrastructure now processes LLM requests in 2-3 seconds using YOLO object detection across 50 Mac mini devices in London and California. Automated scout systems generate game specifications for enhanced testing efficiency.

title: OKR System Evolution
description: Our Passionate Curiosity Reading Club is streamlining company focus by reducing initiatives from 80 to 4-5 next quarter. The goal: better alignment, fewer OKRs, and enhanced collective impact across all teams.

title: Incident Response Optimization
headline: Targeting Sub-6-Hour Incident Resolution
description: New weekly on-call scheduling and clear incident vs. bug-fix distinctions aim to dramatically improve response times from current 50-hour acknowledgment and 119-hour resolution averages.
takeaway: Operational excellence drives better system reliability

title: Campaign Optimization Breakthrough
headline: Bundle Strategy Refinement Drives Better ROI
description: Strategic removal of four underperforming Android and iOS bundles, coupled with CPI model transitions for better volume handling. Supply path optimizations address competitor restrictions while maintaining spend efficiency.

title: SDK Innovation Pipeline
headline: Enhanced Privacy Controls and Install Tracking
description: Android inline install support launches in SDK 3.6.1 with privacy-compliant GDPR TCF 2.3 integration. Click data sharing with UpGrowth enables production-ready analytics by Q2 with differentiated install tracking.

title: Daily Wellness Ritual
headline: Office Yoga Sessions Keep Our Team Centered
quote: Every day at 13:10 CET, Anna Kolyada leads yoga sessions that bring mindfulness to our busy workday
author: Team Wellness Initiative

title: Book Club Momentum
headline: 140+ Participants Drive Knowledge Sharing Culture
description: Our 'Passionate Curiosity' Book Club has become a cornerstone of our learning culture, with 140+ team members actively participating in strategic discussions around execution and goal achievement.

title: Gaming Portfolio Success
headline: Infinite Minesweeper Exceeds Apple Benchmarks
description: Our Infinite Minesweeper achieved 61% retention, significantly outperforming industry standards. Combined with Solitaire's +21.67% D7 retention boost and Crossword's 200%+ ROAS, gaming has turned profitable in 2025.
takeaway: Strategic focus on casual gaming pays dividends

title: Fraud Prevention Victory
headline: Dynamic SDK Signatures Cut Fraud by 82%
description: Our advanced fraud detection system with dynamic SDK signatures has dramatically reduced fraud rates from 22% to under 4%, protecting both our partners and revenue streams through intelligent detection algorithms.

title: Sales Excellence Week
headline: 8 Deals Closed in Single Week Performance
description: Our sales team delivered exceptional results with 8 successful deal closures generating $390k in net revenue, demonstrating strong market demand and effective sales execution.
takeaway: Consistent sales performance drives sustainable growth

title: AI Integration Vision
headline: Every Employee to Manage 5-10 AI Agents Soon
description: Within 3-6 months, every team member will manage 5-10 AI agents as we transform into an AI-first organization. Our OKR Auditor already checks 1,000+ individual OKRs daily, while Daria AI Bot saves $4k weekly analyzing app reviews.
